html:
Exclusive to:

The Nightberry is a Generic type of Food that can be found on Gloomthorn trees in bunches of four. After picking them from a Gloomthorn tree, they will regrow after 12 to 25 days. After eating Nightberries, the player will be slowed for a few seconds and gain night vision for 4 minutes. While the night vision effect is active the player will lose ~4,4 /minute, totaling at -17.75 Sanity over the duration.

Nightberries and Cooked Nightberries can be put into Crock Pot and serve as 1 Fruit Value.

Cooked Nightberry

The Cooked Nightberry can be made by cooking Nightberry at a Fire Pit. Eating Cooked Nightberry do not grant a night vision effect.

Trivia

  • The Nightberry was introduced in the Staying Afloat update.
  • The night vision granted after eating the raw Nightberry is likely a visual hallucination, with the blue tinting and pulsing veins around the side of the screen being a part of that. The steep sanity cost and perpetual sanity drain during the 4 minutes of night vision possibly indicates other druglike qualities.
  • Since the cooked Nightberries do not grant night vision, the hallucinogenic compound responsible is likely heat-sensitive, and breaks down when exposed to high heat.

Gallery

  • Old Cooked Nightberry icon
  • Old Cooked Nightberry
  • Nightberry Overlay
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

"ancientfruit_nightvision"
“I just wish it was less... twitchy.”
–Wilson
“Ew, is that berry... squirming?”
–Willow
“Eeep!”
–Wolfgang
“It's still beating...”
–Wendy
“I HATE LOOKING AT IT”
–WX-78
“If consumed, it seems to improve one's vision in the darkness.”
–Wickerbottom
“Nope. Don't like the look of that.”
–Woodie
“Hm. Tangy.”
–Maxwell
“It writhes upön the gröund! Be it berry ör beast?!”
–Wigfrid
“Um... are we sure it's not full of baby spiders?”
–Webber
“I think... I may have lost my appetite.”
–Warly
“Friend make eyes and head feel funny”
–Wormwood
“I don't think berries are supposed to do that.”
–Winona
“Just one bite to help my sight at night.”
–Wortox
“Squirminess add more flavor, florp.”
–Wurt
“Did you ever hear the story about the disembodied heart that kept beating?”
–Walter
“Not exactly appetizing, but useful in the dark.”
–Wanda
The Nightberry is a Generic type of Food that can be found on Gloomthorn trees in bunches of four. After picking them from a Gloomthorn tree, they will regrow after 12 to 25 days. After eating Nightberries, the player will be slowed for a few seconds and gain night vision for 4 minutes. While the night vision effect is active the player will lose ~4,4 /minute, totaling at -17.75 Sanity over the duration.
Nightberries and Cooked Nightberries can be put into Crock Pot and serve as 1 Fruit Value.

"ancientfruit_nightvision_cooked"
“At least it stopped twitching.”
–Wilson
“It's not moving anymore. Thanks, fire!”
–Willow
“Is less gross, but still not look yummy.”
–Wolfgang
“It beats no more.”
–Wendy
“PREFER TO EAT IT LIVE”
–WX-78
“A bit easier to digest, but lacking in any vision-improving effects.”
–Wickerbottom
“Is there anything else to eat?”
–Woodie
“I prefer them raw.”
–Maxwell
“The löathesöme berry hath ceased its wriggling.”
–Wigfrid
“It doesn't help our eyes, but it also doesn't hurt our tummy as much.”
–Webber
“Better, but now it's missing that certain je ne sais quoi.”
–Warly
“Friend cooked”
–Wormwood
“At least it ain't pulsin'.”
–Winona
“I miss the wriggle, it made me giggle.”
–Wortox
“Glorp! Why not squirmy anymore?”
–Wurt
“It was more exciting when it was moving.”
–Walter
“That's a bit better. I think.”
–Wanda
The Cooked Nightberry can be made by cooking Nightberry at a Fire Pit. Eating Cooked Nightberry do not grant a night vision effect.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Nightberry was introduced in the Staying Afloat update.
The night vision granted after eating the raw Nightberry is likely a visual hallucination, with the blue tinting and pulsing veins around the side of the screen being a part of that. The steep sanity cost and perpetual sanity drain during the 4 minutes of night vision possibly indicates other druglike qualities.
Since the cooked Nightberries do not grant night vision, the hallucinogenic compound responsible is likely heat-sensitive, and breaks down when exposed to high heat.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Quả Nightberry là một loại Thực phẩm Chung có thể tìm thấy trên cây Gloomthorn theo bó bốn quả. Sau khi hái chúng từ cây Gloomthorn, chúng sẽ mọc lại sau 12 đến 25 ngày. Sau khi ăn Nightberry, người chơi sẽ bị làm chậm trong vài giây và có được tầm nhìn ban đêm trong 4 phút. Trong khi hiệu ứng nhìn đêm được kích hoạt, người chơi sẽ mất ~4,4/phút, tổng cộng là -17,75 Tinh Thần trong suốt thời gian.

The '''Nightberry''' is a [[Food Type/DST#Generic|Generic]] type of Food that can be found on [[Gloomthorn]] trees in bunches of four. After picking them from a Gloomthorn tree, they will regrow after 12 to 25 days. After eating Nightberries, the player will be slowed for a few seconds and gain night vision for 4 minutes. While the night vision effect is active the player will lose ~4,4 {{Sanity}}/minute, totaling at -17.75 [[Sanity]] over the duration.

Nightberries and Cooked Nightberries can be put into [[Crock Pot/DST|Crock Pot]] and serve as 1 [[Food Value/DST#Fruit value|Fruit Value]].
